# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deploy

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v3
        with:
          node-version: '16'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run custom build script
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production
        run: |
          if [ -f ./scripts/build.sh ]; then
            chmod +x ./scripts/build.sh
            ./scripts/build.sh
          else
            echo "No build script found."
          fi

      - name: Run custom deployment script
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: production
        run: |
          if [ -f ./scripts/deploy.sh ]; then
            chmod +x ./scripts/deploy.sh
            ./scripts/deploy.sh
          else
            echo "No deployment script found."
          fi

      - name: Clean up sensitive files
        run: |
          rm -f ./scripts/build.sh
          rm -f ./scripts/deploy.sh

      - name: Verify deployment
        run: echo "Deployment verification step can be added here."
